channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Very deep hole at junction of Painswick Road and Suffolk Road, 28th May
item.description:
Looks like a sink hole and could easily trap a wheel. On left hand side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Suffolk Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alleyway footpath, 28th May
item.description:
Overgrown branches and bushes and weeds blocking footpath again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Priory Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large sharp edge on speed bump, 28th May
item.description:
Going up station road towards Woodmancote just past gotherington lane. The speed bump has deteriorated and has a large sharp edge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Station Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th May
item.description:
Even more rubbish dumped in the usual location. It’s only the FOURTH time in FOUR days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Alstone Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car for several weeks on double yellow line, 28th May
item.description:
This car has been here several weeks and is likely abandoned. It has been parked illegally on double yellow lines.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Grosvenor Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th May
item.description:
A second shopping trolley full of household waste has joined the other trolley.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Pates Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disabled parking bay no longer needed, 28th May
item.description:
A disabled parking bay outside 21 Beaufort Road GL52 6JS. No longer needed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Beaufort Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Low hanging branch, 28th May
item.description:
I am a bus driver, driving double deckers up this section of road eastbound, there is a low hanging tree branch
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: EX utility repair needs repair, 28th May
item.description:
There is a cut in the road that has been made by a utility provider, which is now falling into disrepair. The specific area is on the side heading to the 435 and is located just before the entrance to LIDL.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This tree and general overgrown surroundings need cutting, 28th May
item.description:
This tree and general overgrown surroundings need cutting all along the 435 on this stretch walking is interrupted by the overspill of vegetation. Specifically the tree in the photo requires limbo skills to be used. This reduces visibility and is dangerous. WHY cannot the vegetation be cut before it has grown, as this would be a quicker operation, and cost less. and not be so unsightly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Single lines dropped curb, 28th May
item.description:
Outside my address of 7a court road brockworth Gloucester Gl34el, dropped curb, single line but doubles either side of my address, so cars, delivered to the shops park there most days causing me not to access the highway or get onto my drive, local police can not help and council advised me to speak to you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Road, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges, 28th May
item.description:
All of Abbotswood Brockworth road verges are like or worse than this. Larger areas have been cut recently but these have not hence the now dreadful eyesore state of them

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbotswood Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus Stop has pen, 28th May
item.description:
The bus stop has pen on it, presumably since the new W timetable was put in. Also on the shelter there’s is graffiti on it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, North Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised problem, 28th May
item.description:
PERM REPAIR JOB 42652932: Ringway request enquiry set up for street lighting for a repair
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 28th May
item.description:
Cut back hedge to assist visibility at junction 12mtrs Stop and go TM ///scope.relay.chair (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several trees requiring pruning, 28th May
item.description:
Several trees and bushes overhanging the pathway . Please make this safer for pedestrians urgently

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charlton Lane, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 28th May
item.description:
28day with Standard tm CW pothole 1000x400x40mm perm repair (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 28th May
item.description:
28day with road closure CW pothole 1400x450x40mm plus x4 NSD perm repair (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 28th May
item.description:
28day with Standard tm with fway closure lift and relay sunken slab 750x600x23mm STATS (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 28th May
item.description:
28day with Standard tm with fway closure lift and relay sunken slab 750x600x27mm STATS (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
